# AWS CloudTrail Terraform Module Example

This Terraform module is designed to facilitate the creation of AWS CloudTrail resources. It provides a generic way of creating CloudTrail trails and configuring them to send logs to CloudWatch.

## Usage

To run this example you need to execute:

```
$ terraform init
$ terraform plan
$ terraform apply
```

Note that this example may create resources which cost money. Run terraform destroy when you don't need these resources.

<!-- BEGIN_TF_DOCS -->
### Requirements

No requirements.

### Providers

No providers.

### Modules

| Name | Source | Version |
|------|--------|---------|
| <a name="module_cloudtrail"></a> [cloudtrail](#module\_cloudtrail) | ../../../modules/cloudtrail | n/a |

### Resources

No resources.

### Inputs

No inputs.

### Outputs

| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
| <a name="output_cloudtrail_arn"></a> [cloudtrail\_arn](#output\_cloudtrail\_arn) | The Amazon Resource Name of the trail. |
| <a name="output_cloudtrail_s3_id"></a> [cloudtrail\_s3\_id](#output\_cloudtrail\_s3\_id) | The Name of S3 bucket for logging of Cloudtrail. |
<!-- END_TF_DOCS -->
